gamerule.mca_inclusive_expressions:force: Forces 3D breasts on all male/masculine characters globally regardless of individual traits.
gamerule.mca_inclusive_expressions.force: Forces 3D breasts on all male/masculine characters globally regardless of individual traits.
gamerule.mca_inclusive_expressions:allow: Forces 3D breasts on all male/masculine characters globally regardless of individual traits.
gamerule.mca_inclusive_expressions.allow: Forces 3D breasts on all male/masculine characters globally regardless of individual traits.
gamerule.mca_inclusive_expressions:full_: Percentage chance (0-100%) for male villagers to spawn with the Full-Chested trait.
gamerule.mca_inclusive_expressions.full_: Percentage chance (0-100%) for male villagers to spawn with the Full-Chested trait.
